description_long: This is a medium-sized, rectangular handbag crafted from brown leather with a soft, quilted texture on one side, featuring a chevron pattern. The bag is equipped with a single, long gold-tone chain strap that can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, draping elegantly across the bag. The front side displays the chevron stitching, while the back is smooth and unadorned. The handbag appears to have a flap closure, likely secured by a hidden magnetic snap, as no visible zippers or buckles are present. The chain strap is attached at both ends with metal hardware, adding a touch of sophistication. There are no visible brand logos or additional decorative elements aside from the chain and stitching.
description: A brown leather handbag with a chevron-quilted front, gold-tone chain strap, and flap closure. The design is elegant and minimal, with no visible logos or extra decorations.
description_view_0: The back of the handbag is visible, showing a smooth brown leather surface and the gold chain strap draped across it.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the handbag's slim profile and the way the chain strap loops along the side.
description_view_2: The front of the handbag displays the chevron-quilted pattern and the flap closure, with the chain strap resting on top.
description_view_3: The opposite side view shows the bag's thickness and the chain strap attachment, with the flap edge slightly visible.
attribute_strap_type: Single long gold-tone chain strap, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear, non-adjustable, attached at both ends with metal hardware.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Flap closure, likely with a hidden magnetic snap, located at the top front of the bag.
attribute_decorative_elements: Gold-tone chain strap and chevron-pattern stitching.
attribute_pattern: Chevron quilted pattern on the front; otherwise plain.
